title: Long Day Factory
about: Long Day Factory is a series of memes about working at the "long day factory," a fictional workplace based on the idea of having a "long day" at work. The earliest known example of a long day factory meme was posted by iFunny user FLONCHZONE in June 2023 and inspired numerous variations over the following years, many of which features animals dreading working a day at the long day factory.
origin: On June 30th, 2023, iFunny[1] user FLONCHZONE posted a meme showing a seal being pet by a person wearing a rubber glove, captioned, "Me after a long day at the long day factory," garnering over 18,400 smiles in two years. This is the earliest known example of a meme playing with the idea of the "long day factory."
